snippet: A Special School Transport Administration allocation is used to manage transport arrangements in consultation with bus contractors and parents. *Including primary, secondary and primary/secondary combined schools with a defined special school campus. Funding is calculated for each of the 4 school terms. Funding is allocated through cash funding. Funding is calculated based on enrolment ranges provided in the rates section below. For example, a school with 27 enrolments would fall into the 26 to 50 enrolment range.
